elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip
elements.doc: This class represents a Clip in Live. It can be either an AudioClip or a MIDI Clip, in an Arrangement or the Session, dependingon the Track (Slot) it lives in.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.available_warp_modes
elements.doc: Available for AudioClips only.Get/Set the available warp modes, that can be used.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.canonical_parent
elements.doc: Get the canonical parent of the Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.color
elements.doc: Get/set access to the color of the Clip (RGB).

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.color_index
elements.doc: Get/set access to the color index of the Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.end_marker
elements.doc: Get/Set the Clips end marker pos in beats/seconds (unit depends on warping).

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.end_time
elements.doc: Get the clip's end time.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.file_path
elements.doc: Get the path of the file represented by the Audio Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.gain
elements.doc: Available for AudioClips only.Read/write access to the gain setting of theAudio Clip

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.gain_display_string
elements.doc: Return a string with the gain as dB value

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.groove
elements.doc: Get the groove associated with this clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.has_envelopes
elements.doc: Will notify if the clip gets his first envelope or the last envelope is removed.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.has_groove
elements.doc: Returns true if a groove is associated with this clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.is_arrangement_clip
elements.doc: return true if this Clip is an Arrangement Clip.A Clip can be either a Session or Arrangement Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.is_audio_clip
elements.doc: Return true if this Clip is an Audio Clip.A Clip can be either an Audioclip or a MIDI Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.is_midi_clip
elements.doc: return true if this Clip is a MIDI Clip.A Clip can be either an Audioclip or a MIDI Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.is_overdubbing
elements.doc: returns true if the Clip is recording overdubs

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.is_playing
elements.doc: Get/Set if this Clip is currently playing. If the Clips trigger modeis set to a quantization value, the Clip will not start playing immediately.If you need to know wether the Clip was triggered, use the is_triggered property.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.is_recording
elements.doc: returns true if the Clip was triggered to record or is recording.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.is_triggered
elements.doc: returns true if the Clip was triggered or is playing.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.launch_mode
elements.doc: Get/Set access to the launch mode setting of the Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.launch_quantization
elements.doc: Get/Set access to the launch quantization setting of the Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.legato
elements.doc: Get/Set access to the legato setting of the Clip

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.length
elements.doc: Get to the Clips length in beats/seconds (unit depends on warping).

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.loop_end
elements.doc: Get/Set the loop end pos of this Clip in beats/seconds (unit depends on warping).

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.loop_start
elements.doc: Get/Set the Clips loopstart pos in beats/seconds (unit depends on warping).

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.looping
elements.doc: Get/Set the Clips 'loop is enabled' flag.Only Warped Audio Clips or MIDI Clip can be looped.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.muted
elements.doc: Read/write access to the mute state of the Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.name
elements.doc: Read/write access to the name of the Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.pitch_coarse
elements.doc: Available for AudioClips only.Read/write access to the pitch (in halftones) setting of theAudio Clip, ranging from -48 to 48

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.pitch_fine
elements.doc: Available for AudioClips only.Read/write access to the pitch fine setting of theAudio Clip, ranging from -500 to 500

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.playing_position
elements.doc: Constant access to the current playing position of the clip.The returned value is the position in beats for midi and warped audio clips,or in seconds for unwarped audio clips. Stopped clips will return 0.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.position
elements.doc: Get/Set the loop position of this Clip in beats/seconds (unit depends on warping).

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.ram_mode
elements.doc: Available for AudioClips only.Read/write access to the Ram mode setting of the Audio Clip

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.sample_length
elements.doc: Available for AudioClips only.Get the sample length in sample time or -1 if there is no sample available.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.signature_denominator
elements.doc: Get/Set access to the global signature denominator of the Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.signature_numerator
elements.doc: Get/Set access to the global signature numerator of the Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.start_marker
elements.doc: Get/Set the Clips start marker pos in beats/seconds (unit depends on warping).

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.start_time
elements.doc: Get the clip's start time offset. For Session View clips, this is the time the clip was started. For Arrangement View clips, this is the offset within the arrangement.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.velocity_amount
elements.doc: Get/Set access to the velocity to volume amount of the Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.view
elements.doc: Get the view of the Clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.warp_markers
elements.doc: Available for AudioClips only.Get the warp markers for this audio clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.warp_mode
elements.doc: Available for AudioClips only.Get/Set the warp mode for this audio clip.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.warping
elements.doc: Available for AudioClips only.Get/Set if this Clip is timestreched.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.will_record_on_start
elements.doc: returns true if the Clip will record on being started.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.apply_note_modifications()
elements.doc: Expects a list of notes as returned from get_notes_extended. The content of the list will be used to modify existing notes in the clip, based on matching note IDs. This function should be used when modifying existing notes, e.g. changing the velocity or start time. The function ensures that per-note events attached to the modified notes are preserved. This is NOT the case when replacing notes via a combination of remove_notes_extended and add_new_notes. The given list can be a subset of the notes in the clip, but it must not contain any notes that are not present in the clip.

elements.doc: Crops the clip. The region that is cropped depends on whether the clip is looped or not. If looped, the region outside of the loop is removed. If not looped, the region outside the start and end markers is removed.

elements.name: Live.Clip.Clip.duplicate_region()
elements.doc: Duplicate the notes in the specified region to the destination_time. Only notes of the specified pitch are duplicated or all if pitch is -1. If the transposition_amount is not 0, the notes in the region will be transposed by the transpose_amount of semitones.Raises an error on audio clips.

elements.name: Live.Conversions.audio_to_midi_clip()
elements.doc: Creates a MIDI clip in a new MIDI track with the notes extracted from the given audio_clip. The `audio_to_midi_type` decides which algorithm is used in the process. Raises error when called with an inconvertible clip or invalid `audio_to_midi_type`.

elements.name: Live.Conversions.create_drum_rack_from_audio_clip()
elements.doc: Creates a new track with a drum rack with a simpler on the first pad with the specified audio clip.

elements.name: Live.Conversions.create_midi_track_from_drum_pad()
elements.doc: Creates a new Midi track containing the specified Drum Pad's device chain.

elements.name: Live.Conversions.create_midi_track_with_simpler()
elements.doc: Creates a new Midi track with a simpler including the specified audio clip.

elements.name: Live.Conversions.is_convertible_to_midi()
elements.doc: Returns whether `audio_clip` can be converted to MIDI. Raises error when called with a MIDI clip

elements.name: Live.Conversions.move_devices_on_track_to_new_drum_rack_pad()
elements.doc: Moves the entire device chain of the track according to the track index onto the C1 (note 36) drum pad of a new drum rack in a new track.If the track associated with the track index does not contain any devices nothing changes (i.e. a new track and new drum rack are not created).

elements.name: Live.Conversions.sliced_simpler_to_drum_rack()
elements.doc: Converts the Simpler into a Drum Rack, assigning each slice to a drum pad. Calling it on a non-sliced simpler raises an error.

elements.doc: Returns false if the parameter has been macro mapped or disabled by Max.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song
elements.doc: This class represents a Live set.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.appointed_device
elements.doc: Read, write, and listen access to the appointed Device

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.arrangement_overdub
elements.doc: Get/Set the global arrangement overdub state.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.back_to_arranger
elements.doc: Get/Set if triggering a Clip in the Session, disabled the playback ofClips in the Arranger.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.can_capture_midi
elements.doc: Get whether there currently is material to be captured on any tracks.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.can_jump_to_next_cue
elements.doc: Returns true when there is a cue marker right to the playing pos thatwe could jump to.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.can_jump_to_prev_cue
elements.doc: Returns true when there is a cue marker left to the playing pos thatwe could jump to.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.can_redo
elements.doc: Returns true if there is an undone action that we can redo.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.can_undo
elements.doc: Returns true if there is an action that we can restore.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.canonical_parent
elements.doc: Get the canonical parent of the song.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.clip_trigger_quantization
elements.doc: Get/Set access to the quantization settings that are used to fireClips in the Session.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.count_in_duration
elements.doc: Get the count in duration. Returns an index, mapped as follows: 0 - None, 1 - 1 Bar, 2 - 2 Bars, 3 - 4 Bars.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.cue_points
elements.doc: Const access to a list of all cue points of the Live Song.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.current_song_time
elements.doc: Get/Set access to the songs current playing position in ms.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.exclusive_arm
elements.doc: Get if Tracks should be armed exclusively by default.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.exclusive_solo
elements.doc: Get if Tracks should be soloed exclusively by default.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.groove_amount
elements.doc: Get/Set the global groove amount, that adjust all setup groovesin all clips.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.groove_pool
elements.doc: Get the groove pool.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.is_counting_in
elements.doc: Get whether currently counting in.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.is_playing
elements.doc: Returns true if the Song is currently playing.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.last_event_time
elements.doc: Return the time of the last set event in the song. In contrary tosong_length, this will not add some extra beats that are mostly neededfor Display purposes in the Arrangerview.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.loop
elements.doc: Get/Set the looping flag that en/disables the usage of the globalloop markers in the song.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.loop_length
elements.doc: Get/Set the length of the global loop marker position in beats.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.loop_start
elements.doc: Get/Set the start of the global loop marker position in beats.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.master_track
elements.doc: Access to the Master Track (always available)

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.metronome
elements.doc: Get/Set if the metronom is audible.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.midi_recording_quantization
elements.doc: Get/Set access to the settings that are used to quantizeMIDI recordings.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.nudge_down
elements.doc: Get/Set the status of the nudge down button.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.nudge_up
elements.doc: Get/Set the status of the nudge up button.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.overdub
elements.doc: Legacy hook for Live 8 overdub state. Now hooks tosession record, but never starts playback.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.punch_in
elements.doc: Get/Set the flag that will enable recording as soon as the Song playsand hits the global loop start region.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.punch_out
elements.doc: Get/Set the flag that will disable recording as soon as the Song playsand hits the global loop end region.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.re_enable_automation_enabled
elements.doc: Returns true if some automated parameter has been overriden

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.record_mode
elements.doc: Get/Set the state of the global recording flag.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.return_tracks
elements.doc: Const access to the list of available Return Tracks.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.root_note
elements.doc: Set and access the root note (i.e. key) of the song used for control surfaces. The root note can be a number between 0 and 11, with 0 corresponding to C and 11 corresponding to B.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.scale_intervals
elements.doc: Reports the current scale's intervals as a list of integers, starting with the root note and representing the number of halfsteps (e.g. Major -> 0, 2, 4, 5, 7, 9, 11)

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.scale_name
elements.doc: Set and access the last used scale name for control surfaces. The default scale names that can be saved with a set and recalled are'Major', 'Minor', 'Dorian', 'Mixolydian' ,'Lydian' ,'Phrygian' ,'Locrian', 'Whole Tone', 'Half-whole Dim.', 'Whole-half Dim.', 'Minor Blues', 'Minor Pentatonic', 'Major Pentatonic', 'Harmonic Minor', 'Harmonic Major', 'Dorian #4', 'Phrygian Dominant', 'Melodic Minor', 'Lydian Augmented', 'Lydian Dominant', 'Super Locrian', 'Bhairav', 'Hungarian Minor', '8-Tone Spanish', 'Hirajoshi', 'In-Sen', 'Iwato', 'Kumoi', 'Pelog Selisir', 'Pelog Tembung', 'Messaien 3', 'Messaien 4', 'Messaien 5', 'Messaien 6', 'Messaien 7'

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.scenes
elements.doc: Const access to a list of all Scenes in the Live Song.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.select_on_launch
elements.doc: Get if Scenes and Clips should be selected when fired.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.session_automation_record
elements.doc: Returns true if automation recording is enabled.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.session_record
elements.doc: Get/Set the session record state.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.session_record_status
elements.doc: Get the session slot-recording state.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.signature_denominator
elements.doc: Get/Set access to the global signature denominator of the Song.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.signature_numerator
elements.doc: Get/Set access to the global signature numerator of the Song.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.song_length
elements.doc: Return the time of the last set event in the song, plus som extra beatsthat are usually added for better navigation in the arrangerview.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.swing_amount
elements.doc: Get/Set access to the amount of swing that is applied when adding or quantizing notes to MIDI clips

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.tempo
elements.doc: Get/Set the global project tempo.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.tempo_follower_enabled
elements.doc: Get/Set whether the Tempo Follower is controlling the tempo. The Tempo Follower Toggle must be made visible in the preferences for this property to be effective.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.tracks
elements.doc: Const access to a list of all Player Tracks in the Live Song, exludingthe return and Master Track (see also Song.send_tracks and Song.master_track).At least one MIDI or Audio Track is always available.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.view
elements.doc: Representing the view aspects of a Live document: The Session and Arrangerview.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.visible_tracks
elements.doc: Const access to a list of all visible Player Tracks in the Live Song, exludingthe return and Master Track (see also Song.send_tracks and Song.master_track).At least one MIDI or Audio Track is always available.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.capture_midi()
elements.doc: Capture recently played MIDI material from audible tracks. If no Destination is given or Destination is set to CaptureDestination.auto, the captured material is inserted into the Session or Arrangement depending on which is visible. If Destination is set to CaptureDestination.session or CaptureDestination.arrangement, inserts the material into Session or Arrangement, respectively. Raises a limitation error when capturing into the Session and a new scene would have to be created but can't because it would exceed the limitations.

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.create_audio_track()
elements.doc: Create a new audio track at the optional given index and return it.If the index is -1, the new track is added at the end. It will create a default audio track if possible. If the index is invalid or the new track would exceed the limitations, a limitation error is raised.If the index is missing, the track is created after the last selected item

elements.name: Live.Song.Song.create_midi_track()
elements.doc: Create a new midi track at the optional given index and return it.If the index is -1,  the new track is added at the end.It will create a default midi track if possible. elements.name: Live.Song.Song.create_return_track()

elements.name: Live.Track.Track
elements.doc: This class represents a track in Live. It can be either an Audio track, a MIDI Track, a Return Track or the Master track. The Master Track and at least one Audio or MIDI track will be always present.Return Tracks are optional.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.arm
elements.doc: Arm the track for recording. Not available for Master- and Send Tracks.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.arrangement_clips
elements.doc: const access to the list of clips in arrangement viewThe list will be empty for the master, send and group tracks.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.available_input_routing_channels
elements.doc: Return a list of source channels for input routing.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.available_input_routing_types
elements.doc: Return a list of source types for input routing.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.available_output_routing_channels
elements.doc: Return a list of destination channels for output routing.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.available_output_routing_types
elements.doc: Return a list of destination types for output routing.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.can_be_armed
elements.doc: return True, if this Track has a valid arm property. Not all trackscan be armed (for example return Tracks or the Master Tracks).

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.can_be_frozen
elements.doc: return True, if this Track can be frozen.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.can_show_chains
elements.doc: return True, if this Track contains a rack instrument device that is capable of showing its chains in session view.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.canonical_parent
elements.doc: Get the canonical parent of the track.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.clip_slots
elements.doc: const access to the list of clipslots (see class AClipSlot) for this track.The list will be empty for the master and sendtracks.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.color
elements.doc: Get/set access to the color of the Track (RGB).

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.color_index
elements.doc: Get/Set access to the color index of the track. Can be None for no color.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.current_input_routing
elements.doc: Get/Set the name of the current active input routing.When setting a new routing, the new routing must be one of the available ones.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.current_input_sub_routing
elements.doc: Get/Set the current active input sub routing.When setting a new routing, the new routing must be one of the available ones.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.current_monitoring_state
elements.doc: Get/Set the track's current monitoring state.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.current_output_routing
elements.doc: Get/Set the current active output routing.When setting a new routing, the new routing must be one of the available ones.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.current_output_sub_routing
elements.doc: Get/Set the current active output sub routing.When setting a new routing, the new routing must be one of the available ones.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.devices
elements.doc: Return const access to all available Devices that are present in the TracksDevicechain. This tuple will also include the 'mixer_device' that every Trackalways has.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.fired_slot_index
elements.doc: const access to the index of the fired (and thus blinking) clipslot in this track.This index is -1 if no slot is fired and -2 if the track's stop button has been fired.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.fold_state
elements.doc: Get/Set whether the track is folded or not. Only available if is_foldable is True.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.group_track
elements.doc: return the group track if is_grouped.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.has_audio_input
elements.doc: return True, if this Track can be feed with an Audio signal. This istrue for all Audio Tracks.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.has_audio_output
elements.doc: return True, if this Track sends out an Audio signal. This istrue for all Audio Tracks, and MIDI tracks with an Instrument.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.has_midi_input
elements.doc: return True, if this Track can be feed with an Audio signal. This istrue for all MIDI Tracks.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.has_midi_output
elements.doc: return True, if this Track sends out MIDI events. This istrue for all MIDI Tracks with no Instruments.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.implicit_arm
elements.doc: Arm the track for recording. When The track is implicitly armed, it showsin a weaker color in the live GUI and is not saved in the set.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.input_meter_left
elements.doc: Momentary value of left input channel meter, 0.0 to 1.0. For Audio Tracks only.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.input_meter_level
elements.doc: Return the MIDI or Audio meter value of the Tracks input, depending on thetype of the Track input. Meter values (MIDI or Audio) are always scaledfrom 0.0 to 1.0.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.input_meter_right
elements.doc: Momentary value of right input channel meter, 0.0 to 1.0. For Audio Tracks only.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.input_routing_channel
elements.doc: Get and set the current source channel for input routing.Raises ValueError if the type isn't one of the current values inavailable_input_routing_channels.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.input_routing_type
elements.doc: Get and set the current source type for input routing.Raises ValueError if the type isn't one of the current values inavailable_input_routing_types.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.input_routings
elements.doc: Const access to the list of available input routings.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.input_sub_routings
elements.doc: Return a list of all available input sub routings.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.is_foldable
elements.doc: return True if the track can be (un)folded to hide/reveal contained tracks.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.is_frozen
elements.doc: return True if this Track is currently frozen. No changes should be applied to the track's devices or clips while it is frozen.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.is_grouped
elements.doc: return True if this Track is current part of a group track.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.is_part_of_selection
elements.doc: return False if the track is not selected.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.is_showing_chains
elements.doc: Get/Set whether a track with a rack device is showing its chains in session view.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.is_visible
elements.doc: return False if the track is hidden within a folded group track.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.mixer_device
elements.doc: Return access to the special Device that every Track has: This Device containsthe Volume, Pan, Sendamounts, and Crossfade assignment parameters.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.mute
elements.doc: Mute/unmute the track.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.muted_via_solo
elements.doc: Returns true if the track is muted because another track is soloed.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.name
elements.doc: Read/write access to the name of the Track, as visible in the track header.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.output_meter_left
elements.doc: Momentary value of left output channel meter, 0.0 to 1.0.For tracks with audio output only.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.output_meter_level
elements.doc: Return the MIDI or Audio meter value of the Track output (behind themixer_device), depending on the type of the Track input, this can be a MIDIor Audio meter. Meter values (MIDI or Audio) are always scaled from 0.0 to 1.0.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.output_meter_right
elements.doc: Momentary value of right output channel meter, 0.0 to 1.0.For tracks with audio output only.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.output_routing_channel
elements.doc: Get and set the current destination channel for output routing.Raises ValueError if the channel isn't one of the current values inavailable_output_routing_channels.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.output_routing_type
elements.doc: Get and set the current destination type for output routing.Raises ValueError if the type isn't one of the current values inavailable_output_routing_types.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.output_routings
elements.doc: Const access to the list of all available output routings.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.output_sub_routings
elements.doc: Return a list of all available output sub routings.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.playing_slot_index
elements.doc: const access to the index of the currently playing clip in the track.Will be -1 when no clip is playing.

elements.name: Live.Track.Track.solo
elements.doc: Get/Set the solo status of the track. Note that this will not disable thesolo state of any other track. If you want exclusive solo, you have to disable the solo state of the other Tracks manually.
